title: ECONOMIC EMPOWERMENT - 211info
text: CONSEJO HISPANO ECONOMIC EMPOWERMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Volunteer Income Tax Assistance (VITA) and help with Individual Taxpayer Identification Number (ITIN). Host financial literacy workshops for youth and their families, Decisiones De Dinero, teaching basic money management skills including earning, saving, budgeting, credit/debit, and taxes. 565 12th Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Unrestricted with a focus on serving the Latinx/Hispanic Community Hours: Individual Taxpayer Identification Number (ITIN): Monday-Friday 9am-5:30pm Volunteer Income Tax Assistance (VITA) Tax Season: January 29-April 15: Monday-Friday 9am-5:30pm Decisiones De Dinero: Class time varies Email (503) 325-4547 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 325-4547 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or for current class schedule FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clatsop, Columbia, Tillamook SITE HOURS: Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-5:30pm In-person: Tuesday-Friday 9am-5:30pm Services: Financial Literacy Training * Hispanic/Latino Community Individual Taxpayer Identification Numbers * Hispanic/Latino Community Tax Preparation Assistance Tax Preparation Assistance * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - SEASONAL FOOD BOXES LEGAL SERVICES - DOCUMENT ASSISTANCE AND NOTARY PUBLIC MUTUAL SUPPORT - MUJERES APOYANDO MUJERES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CONSEJO HISPANO
